name: Flappy Minecraft
description: Flappy Minecraft is a fast-paced arcade game that combines classic Flappy Bird gameplay with a familiar Minecraft-inspired visual style. Players control a flying character and must stay airborne while passing through obstacles with precise timing and quick reflexes. Unlike traditional Flappy-style games, the green block obstacles appear suddenly and randomly, forcing players to react instantly instead of memorizing patterns. This unexpected obstacle system makes every run unique and significantly more challenging. Simple controls, increasing difficulty, and unpredictable block placement create a highly addictive experience focused on reflexes
instructions: Tap to keep the character flying and avoid crashing into green blocks Obstacles appear randomly and without warning requiring fast reactions and perfect timing Each successful pass increases your score pushing you to survive longer and beat your best
